titleStmt.title: SII 15.265: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 265. (B.K. No. 70 of 1928-29.) BĪḶGI, BILGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone built into a wall of the well called Rāyarabhāvi.

This is dated Śaka 1526, Krōdhi, Māgha śu. 2, Friday, Dhanishṭhā-nakshatra, The details of the date correspond to 1605 A.D., January 11. The Sultan of Bijāpur is referred to as the son of Ali Ādilshāh.

It records the completion of a charitable well at Bīḷagi by Khaṇḍērāya-paṇḍita. who was holding the ṭhāṇe under Vajīra, Khāne-Ajam, Yākūta-khāna who was in charge of the Bīḷagi-samata as Mokhāsi. It is stated that the digging of the well was started on Śaka 1525, Śubhakrit, Adhika-Āshāḍha paurṇami, Monday, Mūlānakshatra, corresponding to 1603 A.D., June 13. The cyclic year was, however, Śōbhana. Cf. No. 264 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© . śrī gaṇēsāyēṁnama . śrī sāradāyēṁ nama . namastuṁ
bisirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī nrapa śālivāhana śa
ka . 1527 . prava¨rtamāna krōdhināma saṁvatsarē māghamā
sē suklapakṣē dvitīya bhā¨rgavāsarē dhaniṣṭanakṣatrē varayānunā
mayōgē rājādhipati Alli Ādīśahana putra yibharāhima A
dilaśāha Ātana vajīra khāna Ajaṁ yāk�takhānage bīḷigi samatu
mōkhāsi yiralikāgi śavunakagōtrada tiṁmāji paṁḍitara putra
khaṁḍērāya paṁḍitage samatina ṭhāṇevākoṭṭu yiralikāgi Ātanu
taṁna kaṣṭā¨rjitadravyava vecisi paravupakāra nimityavāgi bīḷagigrāma
da paścimabhāgadalli bāviyanu kaṭṭisidanu . śaka . 1525 . prava¨rta
māna śubhakratanāma saṁvatsarada Adhika Āśāḍhamāsē suklapakṣē pa
va¨rnami caṁdravārē ghaṭikā . 28 . mūlanakṣatradalli kūpa Āraṁbha
vāyittu . vaṁduvara ṣa yēḷu tiṁgaḷu hatoṁbhatu divasaṁ pariyaṁ
ta bāviya kelasava māḍidarū bāvi siddhi Āyi� . [Igavā]
kaṭṭisidanu . yidake A¨rdha cāvura bhūmiyanu . vaṁdu
tōṁṭavanu māṁnyava koḍisidarū . yidake dārādare yī
si ki(khi)la māḍidare hiṁdūrige . musalamānaṟige nā
latu sāya . yāvatiṣṭati caṁdrā¨rkō yāvatiṣṭati mēdi
nī tāvadrakṣaṁtu kūpaṁ ca viśvēṣāmarava�bhā . © . śrī .
svadattā dviguṇaṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttā Apahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . 1 . maṁga
ḷa śubhaṁ bhavatu . śrī kṛṣṇā¨rpaṇava stu . kūpa sapūnnavāyittu. The letters yettu are written below the line.
